```{=html}
<!-- Filtering on two columns. FR2_HITS marks, per column, which cells satisfy
     that column's condition; a row survives only if ALL its conditions match. -->
<script>
window.FR2_TITLE_PRE = 'filter(';
window.FR2_CONDS_TEXT = ['species == "Chinstrap"', 'bill_length_mm > 45'];
window.FR2_TITLE_POST = ')';
window.FR2_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    '41.80'],
  ['Adelie',    '36.50'],
  ['Adelie',    '40.30'],
  ['Chinstrap', '45.40'],
  ['Chinstrap', '46.50'],
  ['Chinstrap', '46'],
  ['Gentoo',    '43.60'],
  ['Gentoo',    '45.10'],
  ['Gentoo',    '50.70'],
];
window.FR2_COLS = ['species', 'bill_length_mm'];
// one base colour per condition (highlight fill + matching code/text shade)
window.FR2_COLORS = ['#4a86c5', '#e8853a'];
// one boolean array per column: does that cell satisfy the column's condition?
window.FR2_HITS = [
  // species == "Chinstrap"
  [false, false, false, true,  true,  true,  false, false, false],
  // bill_length_mm > 45
  [false, false, false, true,  true,  true,  false, true,  true ],
];
</script>
```

::: {.fr2-stage-wrap}
<div id="fr2-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .fr2-frag id="fr2-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .fr2-frag id="fr2-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .fr2-frag id="fr2-both"}
[]{.fragment .fr2-frag id="fr2-arrows"}
